annual_rate.notes: Georgia has two prejudgment schemes, both simple: LIQUIDATED demands bear 7% — the legal rate (O.C.G.A. §7-4-2), applied from when the sum became due (§7-4-15). UNLIQUIDATED tort/personal-injury damages, after a proper written demand, instead bear prime + 3% (currently 9.75%, variable) under §51-12-14, running from the 30th day after the notice. Verified 2026-07-11. Not legal advice.
